name: structdraw-dev
description: Dev-time test harness for StructDraw. NOT a build dependency: the app (index.html) runs in a browser with no build step. This package.json and node_modules/ exist ONLY for `npm test` (Vitest + JSDOM unit tests of the architecture-v2 model + render layers). See PlannedBuilds/architecture-v2/. The `three` devDependency is pinned to the exact r128 release so the JSDOM mesh tests exercise the same Three.js API surface as the browser (CLAUDE.md rule 6: r128 only).
